flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at State Fair Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.2k → $7.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at State Fair Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.2k → $2.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at State Fair Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
